channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Plugable 10-in-1 USB-C Hub review: This sleek and durable dock transformed my two-port laptop into a capable desktop workstation
item.description: Boost the connection options for your slimline laptop with this USB hub that will boost your port options to 10, including impressive 2.5GbE Ethernet and HDMI 2.1.

item.title: The funeral for PlayStation discs has begun
item.description: Cody Spencer, the co-owner of the small games retail chain Pink Gorilla Games, put it well when I asked about the impact of Sony's recent announcement that it will stop making discs for new games starting January 2028. "It's sad to see. This decision is only a negative for gamers. We're losing the ability to […]

item.title: WhatsApp usernames are already raising impersonation red flags
item.description: Meta says usernames improve privacy, but critics question whether its safeguards can prevent impersonation.

item.title: In honor of the final season, I rounded up the best Squid Game merch — these are the collectables, apparel, and... er... crochet sets worth buying
item.description: The games are almost over — here are my favorite accessories for fans.

item.title: Quote of the day by former Apple design chief Jony Ive: 'True simplicity is derived from so much more than just the absence of clutter and ornamentation' — laying the foundation for a timeless design philosophy
item.description: The world's most renowned tech designer excelled at making complex electronics feel accessible thanks to a different way of thinking

item.title: The Control Gap: Enterprise AI organizations have an ownership problem, not a technology problem — and most are governing it by hand
item.description: AI portfolios are expanding far faster than the ability to govern them across enterprises. Most organizations run a contested field of platforms, each claiming to be the “primary” AI layer; few could confidently detect a model drifting or failing in production; and the single most-cited barrier to control is the absence of any one owner accountable for AI across the stack. The result is a widening control gap — ambition and spend racing ahead of visibility, ownership, and cost control — with autonomous agents already producing real financial and operational failures.This wave of VentureBeat Pu...

item.title: Mexico’s Victory Over Ecuador Made the Ground Shake. Was It an Artificial Earthquake?
item.description: Fans’ euphoric reactions to the Mexican national team’s recent victory in the 2026 World Cup caused a series of unusual vibrations that were detected by seismic warning systems.

item.title: How to watch USA vs Bosnia and Herzegovina: Free Streams, TV Channels & Kick-Off time as FIFA World Cup 2026 co-hosts target rare knockout win
item.description: Here's how to watch USA vs Bosnia and Herzegovina for free online and from anywhere at the FIFA World Cup 2026, as the co-hosts look to reach the last 16.

item.title: Zoning authority could be the answer to data center woes, as San Marcos becomes the first Texas city to ban data centers
item.description: Zoning laws could help ban data centers in Texas cities, but there is state legislation that might get in the way

item.title: Xbox’s ‘reset’: all the news about Microsoft’s looming layoffs and studio closures
item.description: Xbox is making some big changes — again. On June 10th, a few months after Asha Sharma took over as CEO, she and newly-promoted chief content officer Matt Booty sent a memo to staff warning of an “Xbox reset.” The business, they said, is facing significant challenges, including a 3 percent “accountability margin,” massively higher […]

item.title: Apple's Hide My Email may not be hiding anything
item.description: A vulnerability can reportedly connect real email addresses to anonymous ones.

item.title: Kroger to buy regional grocer Giant Eagle in $1.65 billion deal
item.description: Kroger and Giant Eagle said they anticipate having to divest a limited number of Giant Eagle stores in order to receive the necessary regulatory clearance. Kroger said Wednesday it plans to buy regional grocer and pharmacy retailer Giant Eagle in a deal valued at $1.65 billion.

item.title: Startup revives the shape of the iconic 21:9 Toshiba laptop that was too ahead of its time — Vitalink has a 4K touchscreen and a backlit keyboard
item.description: VitaLink combines a foldable keyboard and ultrawide 4K touchscreen while reviving concepts pioneered by Toshiba and revisited recently.

item.title: Goose, a New Gay Dating App, Appears to Be a Psyop
item.description: Touted as a less-hookup-focused Grindr, Goose is an invite-only space for gay men. The problem is the people promoting it don’t seem real.
